@graph.rdfs:comment: A group of biological subjects sharing an experimental condition, treatment, or study role.
@graph.rdfs:label: Experimental Group

@graph.rdfs:comment: A record assigning a subject or group to an enclosure in a study or housing context.
@graph.rdfs:label: Housing Assignment

@graph.rdfs:comment: An independent variable that an investigation is designed to vary systematically in order to determine its effect on subjects or observations.
@graph.rdfs:label: Study Factor

@graph.rdfs:comment: A biological individual, such as a laboratory animal, observed in a home-cage monitoring context.
@graph.rdfs:label: Subject

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a housing assignment to the enclosure or monitored enclosure involved in that assignment.
@graph.rdfs:label: assigned to enclosure

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a subject to an experimental group of which it is a member.
@graph.rdfs:label: belongs to group

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a subject to a behavior observation about that subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: has behavior observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the biological sex reported for a subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: has biological sex

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the date of birth reported for a subject. The xsd:date datatype is enforced by SHACL because it is outside the OWL 2 datatype map used by HCMO's reasoner.
@graph.rdfs:label: has date of birth

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a subject to a health-status observation about that subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: has health status observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a subject or experimental group to a housing assignment record.
@graph.rdfs:label: has housing assignment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an experimental group to a subject that is a member of the group.
@graph.rdfs:label: has member

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a social housing or care requirement for a subject or experimental group.
@graph.rdfs:label: has social requirement

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the species name or identifier reported for a subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: has species

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the strain, line, or breed reported for a subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: has strain

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a treatment, intervention, or experimental condition assigned to a subject or group.
@graph.rdfs:label: has treatment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a subject to a weight observation about that subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: has weight observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing ambient temperature.
@graph.rdfs:label: ambient temperature

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing ammonia concentration.
@graph.rdfs:label: ammonia concentration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing carbon dioxide concentration.
@graph.rdfs:label: carbon dioxide concentration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Enclosure Dimensions

@graph.rdfs:comment: A structured profile describing environmental conditions or requirements for a monitored enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: Environment Profile

@graph.rdfs:comment: An environmental parameter that may be measured, specified, or controlled in a home-cage monitoring context.
@graph.rdfs:label: Environmental Property

@graph.rdfs:comment: A profile describing concentrations of gases relevant to the monitored enclosure environment.
@graph.rdfs:label: Gas Concentration Profile

@graph.rdfs:comment: A description of the timing and transitions of light and dark phases in an enclosure environment.
@graph.rdfs:label: Light Cycle

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing light intensity.
@graph.rdfs:label: light intensity

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing light state.
@graph.rdfs:label: light state

@graph.rdfs:comment: A specification describing how an environmental property is measured, represented, or constrained.
@graph.rdfs:label: Measurement Specification

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing oxygen concentration.
@graph.rdfs:label: oxygen concentration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environmental profile, specification, or observation to the environmental property representing relative humidity.
@graph.rdfs:label: relative humidity

@graph.rdfs:comment: A welfare or husbandry profile describing environmental conditions intended to support animal thriving.
@graph.rdfs:label: Thrive Profile

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the duration of the dark phase in a light cycle; xsd:duration is enforced by SHACL because that datatype is outside the OWL 2 datatype map.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dark phase duration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the start time of the dark phase in a light cycle; xsd:time is enforced by SHACL because that datatype is outside the OWL 2 datatype map.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dark phase start

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the duration of the dawn transition in a light cycle; xsd:duration is enforced by SHACL because that datatype is outside the OWL 2 datatype map.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dawn duration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dim unit

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the duration of the dusk transition in a light cycle; xsd:duration is enforced by SHACL because that datatype is outside the OWL 2 datatype map.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dusk duration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an enclosure to a structured environment profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has environment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environment profile to a gas concentration profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has gas concentration profile

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the gas type measured or specified in a gas concentration profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has gas type

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has height

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has length

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environment profile to a light cycle.
@graph.rdfs:label: has light cycle

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the duration of the light phase in a light cycle; xsd:duration is enforced by SHACL because that datatype is outside the OWL 2 datatype map.
@graph.rdfs:label: has light phase duration

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an environment profile to a measurement specification.
@graph.rdfs:label: has measurement spec

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a monitored enclosure to the thrive profile that specifies suitable husbandry or environmental conditions.
@graph.rdfs:label: has thrive profile

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated duplicate; use the consolidated hcm:hasUnit property for quantitative results and measurement specifications.
@graph.rdfs:label: has unit

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a literal value for an environmental measurement or specification.
@graph.rdfs:label: has value

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has width

@graph.rdfs:comment: A SOSA-style observation about the behavior of a subject in a home-cage monitoring context.
@graph.rdfs:label: Behavior Observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: An observation result representing a detected, classified, or recorded behavior.
@graph.rdfs:label: Behavior Result

@graph.rdfs:comment: An observation result represented by a category rather than a numeric value.
@graph.rdfs:label: Categorical Result

@graph.rdfs:comment: A SOSA-style observation about an environmental property of a monitored enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: Environment Observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: An environment observation measuring or reporting the concentration of a gas.
@graph.rdfs:label: Gas Concentration Observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: A SOSA-style observation about the health status of a biological subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: Health Status Observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Housing Assignment

@graph.rdfs:comment: A tabular observation result containing location values or generated time-series segments.
@graph.rdfs:label: Location Result Table

@graph.rdfs:comment: An information artifact produced as the result of a home-cage monitoring observation.
@graph.rdfs:label: Observation Result

@graph.rdfs:comment: An observation result that represents a quantitative value, typically with a numeric value and unit.
@graph.rdfs:label: Quantity Value

@graph.rdfs:comment: A SOSA-style observation reporting the body weight of a biological subject.
@graph.rdfs:label: Weight Observation

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: assigned to enclosure

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the behavior type or behavior category associated with a behavior observation or result.
@graph.rdfs:label: has behavior type

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the category assigned to a categorical observation result.
@graph.rdfs:label: has category

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an observation to the condition under which it was made or interpreted; the condition model is intentionally left open.
@graph.rdfs:label: has condition

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a numeric confidence score associated with an observation result.
@graph.rdfs:label: has confidence score

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a textual or coded health-status term associated with a health-status observation.
@graph.rdfs:label: has health status term

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a duration associated with an observation; use sosa:phenomenonTime for a temporal entity. The xsd:duration datatype is enforced by SHACL because it is outside the OWL 2 datatype map.
@graph.rdfs:label: has interval

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the numeric value of a quantity result or measurement.
@graph.rdfs:label: has numeric value

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an observation to the enclosure in which it occurs.
@graph.rdfs:label: occurs in

@graph.rdfs:comment: A device that elicits or perturbs behavior, physiology, or the monitored environment.
@graph.rdfs:label: Actuator

@graph.rdfs:comment: Physical computing hardware component of a home-cage monitoring system.
@graph.rdfs:label: Hardware

@graph.rdfs:comment: A device that captures signals related to behavior, physiology, or enclosure environment.
@graph.rdfs:label: Sensor

@graph.rdfs:comment: Software component used to acquire, process, store, or analyse home-cage monitoring data.
@graph.rdfs:label: Software

@graph.rdfs:comment: An ordered sequence of time-indexed measurements or outputs produced in a monitoring workflow.
@graph.rdfs:label: Time Series

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a sensor to the property it observes or captures.
@graph.rdfs:label: captures

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a technical component to another hardware or software component with which it exchanges data or commands.
@graph.rdfs:label: communicates with

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a monitored enclosure to an actuator associated with it.
@graph.rdfs:label: has actuator

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the file format of a software or time-series artifact.
@graph.rdfs:label: has file format

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the firmware identifier or version installed on a hardware or sensor component.
@graph.rdfs:label: has firmware

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the manufacturer model number for a hardware, sensor, or actuator component.
@graph.rdfs:label: has model number

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the communication, acquisition, or processing protocol used by a technical component.
@graph.rdfs:label: has protocol

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the rate at which a sensor or data stream is sampled, including its unit.
@graph.rdfs:label: has sampling rate

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records an identifier assigned to a sensor.
@graph.rdfs:label: has sensor identifier

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the sensing technology or modality used by a sensor.
@graph.rdfs:label: has sensor technology

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the functional type or category of a sensor.
@graph.rdfs:label: has sensor type

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a path or locator for stored data, software, or time-series resources.
@graph.rdfs:label: has storage path

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a version string for software, firmware, hardware, or data artifacts.
@graph.rdfs:label: has version

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a sensor to the monitored enclosure in which it is installed.
@graph.rdfs:label: installed in

@graph.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether a sensor or device has been calibrated.
@graph.rdfs:label: is calibrated

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a monitored enclosure to a sensor installed in or monitoring it.
@graph.rdfs:label: monitored by

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates software to the hardware or platform on which it executes.
@graph.rdfs:label: runs on

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a technical component to the monitored enclosure that it supports.
@graph.rdfs:label: supports enclosure

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. A device that elicits or perturbs behavior or physiology.
@graph.rdfs:label: Actuator

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. An experimental animal housed in an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: Animal

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Observed behavioral or physiological process displayed by an animal.
@graph.rdfs:label: Behavior and Physiology

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Categorical Result

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. A circadian rhythm associated with a behavior or physiology process.
@graph.rdfs:label: Circadian Rhythm

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Contact detail associated with a submitted system or supplier.
@graph.rdfs:label: Contact Point

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Data artifact or link associated with a submitted system.
@graph.rdfs:label: Data Product

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Geometric dimensions of a physical space or enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: Dimensions

@graph.rdfs:comment: A physical housing enclosure used as part of a home-cage monitoring system.
@graph.rdfs:label: Enclosure

@graph.rdfs:comment: A dimensions record describing the physical size of an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: Enclosure Dimensions

@graph.rdfs:comment: A material or structure provided within an enclosure to support animal welfare or experimental conditions.
@graph.rdfs:label: Enrichment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Physical computing hardware component of a home-cage monitoring system.
@graph.rdfs:label: Hardware

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. A condition indicating minimal human interference during observation.
@graph.rdfs:label: Limited Interaction With Humans

@graph.rdfs:comment: A physical enclosure equipped for the longitudinal monitoring of housed biological subjects.
@graph.rdfs:label: Monitored Enclosure

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Legacy boolean need-profile record used by current examples; prefer a future object-based need profile for richer modeling.
@graph.rdfs:label: Needs Sequence

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated invalid Chowlk/spreadsheet artifact; it never denoted a defined OWL-Time interval table and has no replacement.
@graph.rdfs:label: O W L- Timeintervaltable

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Observation Result

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. An observation time window for behavior capture.
@graph.rdfs:label: Observation Window

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. A spatial region associated with an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: Physical Space

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. A protocol, SOP, or approval reference governing a system submission.
@graph.rdfs:label: Protocol

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Quantity Value

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Sensor

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Software component of a home-cage monitoring system.
@graph.rdfs:label: Software

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated spreadsheet-derived result-table term; use hcm-obs:LocationResultTable.
@graph.rdfs:label: Structural& Location Table

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Study Factors

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Commercial supplier or laboratory providing the system.
@graph.rdfs:label: Supplier

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. This aggregate system concept has no exact replacement: migrate its enclosure, hardware, software, sensor, and actuator components separately.
@graph.rdfs:label: System

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Deprecated; use hcm:ObservationWindow.
@graph.rdfs:label: Time Interval

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: Time Series

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates a sensor to a behavior or physiology process it captures.
@graph.rdfs:label: captures

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0 with no exact replacement. Use hcm:hasMonitoredAnimals for enclosure occupancy and sosa:hasFeatureOfInterest for the subject of a specific observation.
@graph.rdfs:label: collects info on

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates hardware to software that it communicates with.
@graph.rdfs:label: communicates with

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates an animal to a behavior or physiology process it displays.
@graph.rdfs:label: displays

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Duration of an observation window in hours.
@graph.rdfs:label: duration hours

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates an actuator to a behavior or physiology process it elicits or perturbs.
@graph.rdfs:label: elicits

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Deprecated legacy relation from a behavior process to a sufficient observation window.
@graph.rdfs:label: extends enough to capture

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates a system submission to a governing protocol or SOP reference.
@graph.rdfs:label: follows protocol

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0 with no context-free replacement because its subject was an aggregate system. For an actuator associated with a monitored enclosure, use hcm-tech:hasActuator.
@graph.rdfs:label: has actuator

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the intended capacity of an enclosure, such as the number of animals it can house.
@graph.rdfs:label: has capacity

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has category

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates a behavior or physiology process to its circadian rhythm.
@graph.rdfs:label: has circadian rhythm

@graph.rdfs:comment: Provides a textual description for an HCMO resource.
@graph.rdfs:label: has description

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the unit used for enclosure dimension values.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dim unit

@graph.rdfs:comment: Links an enclosure to its dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: has dimensions

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Links a system to its enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has enclosure

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the identifier assigned to an enclosure or monitored enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has enclosure identifier

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an enclosure or monitored enclosure to an enrichment present or specified for it.
@graph.rdfs:label: has enrichment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a textual or coded enrichment requirement for an enclosure or monitored enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has enrichment requirement

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the type or category of enrichment associated with an enrichment resource.
@graph.rdfs:label: has enrichment type

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated datatype-property artifact. Use hcm-env:hasEnvironment to link an enclosure to a structured environment profile; existing literal values require curation.
@graph.rdfs:label: has environment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Boolean flag indicating whether environmental enrichment is provided in a legacy need profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has environmental enrichment

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the type of facility or housing area associated with an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has facility type

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has file format

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the floor area value for an enclosure dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: has floor area

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Boolean flag indicating whether food is provided in a legacy need profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has food

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a textual or coded food-provision requirement for an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has food requirement

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Links a system to its hardware component.
@graph.rdfs:label: has hardware

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the height value of an enclosure dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: has height

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the length value of an enclosure dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: has length

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the manufacturer name for an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has manufacturer

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates a monitored enclosure to the biological subjects housed or tracked within it.
@graph.rdfs:label: has monitored animals

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a human-readable name for an HCMO resource.
@graph.rdfs:label: has name

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has numeric value

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Deprecated legacy relation from an observation window to an observation condition.
@graph.rdfs:label: has property

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0 with no equivalence assertion because legacy restrictions used this relation in the reverse of the SOSA observation-to-result direction. Model current observations with sosa:hasResult.
@graph.rdfs:label: has result

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Boolean flag indicating whether safety from threat is provided in a legacy need profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has safety from threat

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a textual or coded safety requirement for an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has safety requirement

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has sampling rate

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0 with no context-free replacement because its subject was an aggregate system. For a sensor monitoring an enclosure, use hcm-tech:monitoredBy and its inverse hcm-tech:installedIn.
@graph.rdfs:label: has sensor

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Boolean flag indicating whether social contacts are provided in a legacy need profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has social contacts

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Links a system to its software component.
@graph.rdfs:label: has software

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Links an enclosure to the physical space it contains or bounds.
@graph.rdfs:label: has space region

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has storage path

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has thrive profile

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the measurement unit associated with a quantitative observation result or measurement specification.
@graph.rdfs:label: has unit

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: has version

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Boolean flag indicating whether water is provided in a legacy need profile.
@graph.rdfs:label: has water

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records a textual or coded water-provision requirement for an enclosure.
@graph.rdfs:label: has water requirement

@graph.rdfs:comment: Records the width value of an enclosure dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: has width

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Height magnitude for a dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: height

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: installed in

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates a behavior or physiology process to the enclosure where it occurs.
@graph.rdfs:label: is displayed inside

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Whether the observation window is extendable.
@graph.rdfs:label: is extendable

@graph.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether an enclosure is currently occupied by animals.
@graph.rdfs:label: is occupied

@graph.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether a monitored enclosure is currently operational.
@graph.rdfs:label: is operational

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Length magnitude for a dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: length

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates an animal to the enclosure it lives in.
@graph.rdfs:label: lives in

@graph.rdfs:comment: Relates an enclosure or monitored enclosure to the facility, room, rack, or other place in which it is situated.
@graph.rdfs:label: located in

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated HCMO 0.0.1 term retained for backward compatibility.
@graph.rdfs:label: monitored by

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Links a system to the supplier or laboratory that produced it.
@graph.rdfs:label: produced by

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Textual protocol, SOP, DOI, or approval reference.
@graph.rdfs:label: protocol reference

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates an enclosure to a need profile it provides.
@graph.rdfs:label: provides

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Relates an animal to the need profile it requires.
@graph.rdfs:label: requires to thrive

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Unit label for dimensions values.
@graph.rdfs:label: unit

@graph.rdfs:comment: Deprecated in HCMO 0.1.0. Width magnitude for a dimensions record.
@graph.rdfs:label: width

@graph.dc:description: Ontology for home-cage monitoring of laboratory animals
@graph.dc:title: Home-Cage Monitoring Ontology
@graph.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: The Home-Cage Monitoring Ontology (HCMO). Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18925285
